title: [Sign Up] Verify that the signup page renders with all required fields and controls
customPreconds: User is on the Sign Up page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Email address field is present and marked as mandatory.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Email address field should be visible and marked as a required field.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Website field is present and marked as mandatory.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Website field should be visible and marked as a required field.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Password field is present and marked as mandatory.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Password field should be visible and marked as a required field.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the show/hide toggle (eye icon) is present on the Password field.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Eye icon should be visible on the Password field.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Terms and Conditions & Privacy Policy checkbox is present.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Checkbox with "I accept the Terms and Conditions & Privacy Policy" text should be visible and unchecked by default.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the "Get Started" button is present.
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Get Started" button should be visible and interactive.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the "Log In" link is present.

title: [Sign Up] Verify that the "Log In" link on the signup page navigates to the login page
customPreconds: User is on the Sign Up page.

customStepsSeparated.expected: The Login page should be displayed.

title: [Sign Up] Verify that completing signup with valid credentials creates an account and sends a verification email
customPreconds: User is on the Sign Up page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a valid email address, website URL, and password in the corresponding fields.
customStepsSeparated.expected: User should be able to enter values in all fields.

customStepsSeparated.content: Check the "I accept the Terms and Conditions & Privacy Policy" checkbox.

customStepsSeparated.expected: The onboarding / banner setup page should be displayed.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify that a verification email with subject "Verify your email for CookieYes" is received at the registered email address.
